title: Mesh Laundry Bags, 2pcs Mesh Laundry Bag for Washing Machine, Laundry Bags with Zips, Delicates Wash Bag for Laundry, Socks, Blouse -30 x 40cm
features: Packaging: You will receive 2 pcs laundry washing bags in 30 x 40cm.
Durable: polyester material mesh laundry bags. The laundry bag has been thickened for abrasion and wash resistance. Reinforced and neatly stitched seams effectively prevent tears.
Wide applications: washing bags can be used for delicate clothes, socks, bras, baby clothes, etc. that to avoid tangling for easy drying. It can also be used for storing clothes during travel.
Protects clothes: This washing net laundry bags are a wash and care bag, which allows clothes to be cleaned and at the same time effectively protects them from wear and tear and deformation.
Water permeability: the laundry bags for washing machine is designed with mesh holes for a stable structure and high water permeability to ensure a smooth wash and efficient cleaning power.
description: Product Description Protect Your Clothes, Extend Their Life — Laundry Solutions for Every Wash From Delicates to Sneakers — We've Got You Covered Whether it’s bras, shoes, or everyday laundry, our premium mesh bags keep your garments safe from snags, stretching, and tangling. Designed to suit every laundry need, our durable, breathable bags help you wash with confidence — and say goodbye to damaged clothes.
